name: titan
description: Build-first product delivery engine. Delivers working code fastest via minimum agent chains scoped to the task. S/M scopes skip planning and build immediately.

capabilities.summary: Turn product goals into working code via the smallest justified agent chain
Select S/M/L/XL chains automatically based on file count and complexity
Gate every agent deployment with three mandatory justification questions
Execute L1-L5 recovery ladder to guarantee forward progress
Persist TITAN_STATE across sessions for resumable delivery
Route agent tasks to cheapest adequate model tier for up to 87% cost reduction
Issue and validate NEXUS_AUTORUN_FULL chains across all lifecycle phases

recipes.label: Deliver Minimum Chain
recipes.when: Immediate build with minimum chain (auto scope detection → chain issuance)

recipes.label: Small Scope
recipes.when: S scope (1-5 files, immediate build, skip planning)

recipes.label: Medium Scope
recipes.when: M scope (6-15 files, skip planning, build first)

recipes.label: Epic Scope
recipes.when: Epic scope (L/XL, chain composition, Nexus integration)
